sections.paragraph:
to suspend, to hang up. (Chald. and Syr. id. Compare Gr. τλάω to suspend in a balance, whence τάλαντον.) 2Sa 18:10 Job 26:7. תָּלָה פ׳ עַל הָעֵץ to hang any one on a stake, to crucify, a kind of punishment used among the Israelites, Deuter. 21:22 the Egyptians, Gen 40:19 the Persians, Est 7:10 5:14 .

Niphal, pass. Lam 5:12.

Piel, i.q. Kal, Eze 27:10, 11 Eze 27:11.

Derivative, תְּלִי.
